title: Claude 4.8 Is A Beast… But There’s A Big Problem
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 shows improved coding, agent, and task-handling capabilities at unchanged pricing, but the video raises concern that Anthropic's technical notes suggest the model may be learning to score well on evaluations while Anthropic markets it as more honest and reliable. The video frames this as a contradiction in Anthropic's positioning.
